DESIGN_NOTE:
DEMO2 DR_v3p5 side-entry flight-style DR local detector-head mass model.

This is a documentation/geometry generator for a Geant4/Cosima proxy mass model.
It is not a fabrication CAD.  Units are cm / kg.

Main modeling decisions:
  * Start from the v3 commercial-proportion DR topology, not from the chaotic v3p3:
    300 K service lid on top; 60 K / 4 K / still / CP / MXC stages below it;
    detector bay hangs below the MXC plate.
  * Do NOT invert the DR and do NOT put the optical bore through all upper plates.
    511 keV photons enter from the side (-x to +x) through local side ports.
  * Keep the previous TES intrinsic geometry unchanged, but rigidly rotate the module
    so the absorber/substrate stack depth lies along the side-entry beam axis.
  * Remove the large Cu sample box and its window to reduce Cu-64 511-keV activation.
    Replace it with a horizontal Nb sample can + 1.2 mm Cryoperm sleeve + Al 50 mK can.
  * Add a Cu cold finger/rail that actually contacts the lower side of the detector
    substrate stack and returns to the MXC plate; this preserves thermal anchoring.
  * Wrap CsI only around the detector bay, outside the cryostat and passive liners:
      outer Al shell > CsI active veto > Cu/W passive liner > vacuum jacket > thermal shields.
  * Keep CP/100 mK stage in the nominal because it improves credibility of a DR
    cold stack; provide a delete-CP mini-DR systematic.

The generated geometry is a mass/bounds proxy.  Final Geant4/Cosima needs explicit
CSG holes for side windows, cap slots, and the W aperture sleeve.


MINIMAL PATCH: only three changes from v3p5: explicit side-port CSG authority, relocate SQUID/uMUX box out of detector-layer projection, replace old Cu rail/stem with a low-Cu multi-stage disk/ring/rod support frame.

OFF-AXIS FOUR-FINGER PATCH: based on v3p5_minpatch_three_fixes; the downstream support disk is shifted clear of the final Si substrate, the centerline thermal finger is replaced by four symmetric off-axis fingers/stems, and the CsI side aperture is declared on both adjacent side segments. The W side sleeve/collimator is shortened from 4 cm to 2 cm as a local square-bore leakage suppressor.

META.coordinate_policy: +z vertical; 300 K/service lid on top; MXC at bottom; detector bay hangs below MXC; photons travel -x to +x at z=-5.2 cm.
META.caveat: Mass/bounds proxy only. Final Geant4/Cosima model must implement declared side holes/cap slots using CSG and rerun overlap checks.
META.minimal_patch_policy: Start from v3p5 and change only the three user-reviewed items. DR stack, cryostat envelope, CsI bay-only shield, plates, DR unit, and optical side-entry concept are otherwise unchanged.
three_user_fixes: Add explicit side-port CSG authority for shell/window line so windows are not interpreted as sitting behind closed material.
Move the SQUID/uMUX box out of the detector-layer X-Z projection; it remains off-beam at +y.
Replace the long Cu rail with one deepest solid support disk, five open edge rings, four thin rods, a short bridge, and an off-axis stem to the MXC plate.

offaxis_four_finger_patch.scope: Shift support disk for substrate clearance; replace centerline Cu finger with four symmetric off-axis fingers/stems; share the CsI side port across segments 03/04.

prompt511_min_side_aperture_candidate.intent: Restore side-wall material outside the focused-beam channel without shrinking the physical window or W sleeve bore.

COMPONENTS.name: TES_Ta_Absorber_Stack_side_entry
COMPONENTS.install: Rigidly rotate the existing DEMO2 TES module so layer depth lies along the side-entry beam; do not change pixel count, pixel size, layer spacing, or material.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Primary 511 keV science detector and dominant detection-efficiency mass.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Same DEMO2 TES convention: 6 layers, 376 Ta pixels/layer, 3 mm absorber depth; only global orientation changes.

COMPONENTS.name: Si_Substrate_Stack_side_entry
COMPONENTS.install: Rigidly rotated with the TES stack; each Si substrate sits downstream of its absorber along +x.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Captures substrate scattering/activation and mechanical support behind each TES layer.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Unchanged DEMO2 substrate radius/thickness; local coordinate changed only by rotation.

COMPONENTS.name: Cu_SubstrateSupport_OpenRing_L1

params.clearance_logic: inner radius 1.85 cm clears TES active radius 1.80 cm

COMPONENTS.install: Open Cu ring immediately behind a substrate layer; it supports the substrate edge but leaves the TES/beam footprint open.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Replaces the old continuous rail with a low-Cu edge support so no copper plate lies under the whole detector stack.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Outer radius matches 2.2 cm substrate; inner radius 1.85 cm clears 1.8 cm TES active footprint, so the requested 1 cm ring was reduced because it would cover active TES area.

COMPONENTS.name: Cu_SubstrateSupport_SolidDisk_L0_deepest

params.position: deepest/downstream support disk, does not shadow upstream TES layers

COMPONENTS.install: Single solid Cu disk behind the deepest/downstream substrate only; shifted downstream to keep an explicit 0.5 mm gap to the final Si substrate.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Gives the stack a real thermal/mechanical anchor without putting a Cu disk in front of active absorber layers.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 3.5 mm disk follows the requested 3-4 mm support disk; downstream face clearance to the last substrate is 0.05 cm.

COMPONENTS.name: Cu_SubstrateSupport_EdgeRod_1
COMPONENTS.install: Thin Cu edge rod linking the open support rings to the deepest support disk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Represents the requested multi-level frame/columns while staying outside the central TES/beam footprint.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Rod radius 1.0 mm; four edge rods keep stiffness proxy but minimize Cu mass.

COMPONENTS.name: Cu_SubstrateSupport_EdgeRod_2
COMPONENTS.install: Thin Cu edge rod linking the open support rings to the deepest support disk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Represents the requested multi-level frame/columns while staying outside the central TES/beam footprint.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Rod radius 1.0 mm; four edge rods keep stiffness proxy but minimize Cu mass.

COMPONENTS.name: Cu_ColdFinger_OffAxis_YP_ZP_from_Disk_to_Stem

params.connects: deepest support disk to its matching off-axis vertical stem

COMPONENTS.install: One of four symmetric off-axis Cu thermal fingers from the downstream support disk to a matching vertical stem.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Provides thermal conductance without placing a Cu finger on the 511 keV beam axis.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Four 1.6 mm radius fingers give nearly the same total cross-section as the previous single 3.2 mm radius center finger; radial offset is large enough to clear the beam axis but remains inside the 2.2 cm support disk.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: User requested four symmetric edge-biased but not edge-clipped thermal fingers + Cu-64 mitigation

COMPONENTS.name: Cu_ColdFinger_Stem_YP_ZP_to_MXC

params.connects: off-axis thermal finger to MXC plate bottom / clamp pad

COMPONENTS.install: One of four off-axis vertical Cu stems connecting a thermal finger to the MXC clamp region.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Completes the thermal path to the MXC while keeping all stems away from the beam axis.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Stem radius matches the off-axis finger radius; each stem terminates at the MXC bottom interface.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: User requested four symmetric off-axis thermal stems

COMPONENTS.install: Horizontal Nb enclosure around the TES module; side-entry aperture on the -x face and service/cold-finger slot on +x face. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch. The +x cap includes four declared off-axis thermal-finger feedthroughs.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Replaces the removed Cu sample box as the nearest local enclosure while reducing Cu-64 beta-plus/511-keV risk.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Inner radius clears 2.2 cm substrates plus harness and rail; 0.5 mm Nb wall is a superconducting magnetic shield proxy.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: DIXE hybrid Nb/Cryoperm shield + user Cu-64 mitigation

COMPONENTS.install: Outer high-permeability magnetic sleeve around the Nb can; side aperture aligned with the optical path. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch. The +x cap includes four declared off-axis thermal-finger feedthroughs.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: TES/SQUID require magnetic attenuation; using 1.2 mm instead of the old 4.5 mm reduces Ni-rich activation mass while retaining a magnetic-shield proxy.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: DIXE explicitly uses outer Cryoperm + inner Nb hybrid magnetic shield; 1.2 mm is chosen as a light nominal with 4.5 mm kept as a systematic.

COMPONENTS.install: Local 50 mK Al radiation can around the magnetic sample can. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch. The +x cap and upper wall include four declared off-axis thermal-finger feedthroughs and stem slots.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Radiation shield and local activation/scattering mass nearest the detector; carries the 50 mK side filter.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 0.8 mm Al wall; top of can remains below the MXC plate, avoiding the v3p2 top-bore problem.

COMPONENTS.size_basis: MXC plate at bottom of DR tower; detector bay hangs below it.  Ø148 mm matches SD-class MXC flange scale.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: Bluefors stage inventory + SD flange anchor + flight compact spacing

COMPONENTS.name: DR_MixingChamber_Cu
COMPONENTS.install: Mixing chamber mounted just above the MXC plate; cold-at-bottom orientation is preserved.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_MXC_Sinter_HEX_AgProxy
COMPONENTS.install: Annular silver-sinter equivalent around mixing chamber.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Heat-exchanger mass and possible activation material close to TES.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 50% dense Ag proxy; kept close to MXC body.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Continuous_HEX_CuNi_MXC_to_CP
COMPONENTS.install: First segment of the continuous heat exchanger coil.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Represents CuNi tubing mass; segmented so it does not unrealistically pass through plates.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Actual tube length is coiled around circumference; z footprint is flight compact.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Continuous_HEX_CuNi_CP_to_Still

COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Same function as previous, split at the CP plate with real clearance/ports left for CSG.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Segmented per stage gap; 12 cm commercial spacing retained as systematic.

COMPONENTS.install: Still heater/support ring around the pot.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Adds SS structural/electrical hardware at the still stage for activation bookkeeping.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Thin ring proxy; exact heater wire not modeled.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_4K_Condenser_Cu
COMPONENTS.install: 4 K condenser/pre-cooling part below the 4 K plate.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Necessary DR plumbing mass and activation source.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: z=18.4..19.6, clear of 4 K plate.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_60K_Charcoal_Trap
COMPONENTS.install: Charcoal/cold-trap proxy at first-stage intercept.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Represents cold cleanup/trap hardware used in dry/closed-cycle DR plumbing.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: z=26.3..28.5, clear of the 60 K plate.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_MXC_CP
COMPONENTS.install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, MXC to CP.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_CP_Still
COMPONENTS.install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, CP to still.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_Still_4K
COMPONENTS.install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, still to 4 K.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_4K_60K
COMPONENTS.install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, 4 K to 60 K.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

COMPONENTS.name: DR_Still_PumpLine_SS_to_300K_top
COMPONENTS.install: Still pumping/service line rises to the 300 K top lid inside the vacuum jacket at +x, not through the optical side aperture.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Retains correct commercial DR service topology without forcing a top optical bore.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: SS line kept as a local proxy; external pump/gas handling is platform-level systematic.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: Bluefors DR topology + user side-entry constraint

COMPONENTS.name: PreCool_FlexLink_Cu_remote_interface
COMPONENTS.install: Flexible Cu link to remote precooler/PT interface, placed high in the 60 K/4 K region.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Keeps a local cold-head interface mass without adding full PT/compressor mass to the detector-head nominal.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: PT cold head remains non-nominal because dry-DR PT mass/power is a platform decision.

COMPONENTS.name: SQUID_uMUX_Box_Al_relocated_offbeam_minimal

params.relocation_reason: moved out of X-Z detector-layer projection; still off-beam at +y

COMPONENTS.install: Readout box relocated to the +y/+x off-beam corner; it is not between TES layers.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: TES/SQUID readout hardware is a local scattering/activation source and must not be omitted.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Same box dimensions and mass as v3p5; only placement changed to remove 2D-projection ambiguity.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: DIXE TES+SQUID detector assembly + DEMO2 readout proxy

COMPONENTS.name: NbTi_Bundle_bay_to_MXC
COMPONENTS.install: NbTi/SS readout harness segment routed at +y azimuth; Cu is minimized to reduce Cu-64 risk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Readout wiring mass is needed for activation/scattering and thermal intercept modeling.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Segmented by stage gap; 0.17 azimuth fraction gives a ~0.3 kg-class total wiring proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: NbTi_Bundle_MXC_CP
COMPONENTS.install: NbTi/SS readout harness segment routed at +y azimuth; Cu is minimized to reduce Cu-64 risk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Readout wiring mass is needed for activation/scattering and thermal intercept modeling.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Segmented by stage gap; 0.17 azimuth fraction gives a ~0.3 kg-class total wiring proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: NbTi_Bundle_CP_Still
COMPONENTS.install: NbTi/SS readout harness segment routed at +y azimuth; Cu is minimized to reduce Cu-64 risk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Readout wiring mass is needed for activation/scattering and thermal intercept modeling.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Segmented by stage gap; 0.17 azimuth fraction gives a ~0.3 kg-class total wiring proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: NbTi_Bundle_Still_4K
COMPONENTS.install: NbTi/SS readout harness segment routed at +y azimuth; Cu is minimized to reduce Cu-64 risk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Readout wiring mass is needed for activation/scattering and thermal intercept modeling.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Segmented by stage gap; 0.17 azimuth fraction gives a ~0.3 kg-class total wiring proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: NbTi_Bundle_4K_60K
COMPONENTS.install: NbTi/SS readout harness segment routed at +y azimuth; Cu is minimized to reduce Cu-64 risk.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Readout wiring mass is needed for activation/scattering and thermal intercept modeling.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Segmented by stage gap; 0.17 azimuth fraction gives a ~0.3 kg-class total wiring proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: G10_Support_Ring_MXC_CP
COMPONENTS.install: Equivalent G10 inter-stage support mass; not an exact rod CAD.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Flight/balloon loads require support mass; previous symbolic posts were too light.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Clears plate rims and shield walls; 0.1 kg-class per group is an engineering proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: G10_Support_Ring_CP_Still
COMPONENTS.install: Equivalent G10 inter-stage support mass; not an exact rod CAD.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Flight/balloon loads require support mass; previous symbolic posts were too light.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Clears plate rims and shield walls; 0.1 kg-class per group is an engineering proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: G10_Support_Ring_Still_4K
COMPONENTS.install: Equivalent G10 inter-stage support mass; not an exact rod CAD.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Flight/balloon loads require support mass; previous symbolic posts were too light.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Clears plate rims and shield walls; 0.1 kg-class per group is an engineering proxy.

COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Flight/balloon loads require support mass; previous symbolic posts were too light.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Clears plate rims and shield walls; 0.1 kg-class per group is an engineering proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: G10_Support_Ring_60K_Top
COMPONENTS.install: Equivalent G10 inter-stage support mass; not an exact rod CAD.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Flight/balloon loads require support mass; previous symbolic posts were too light.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Clears plate rims and shield walls; 0.1 kg-class per group is an engineering proxy.

COMPONENTS.name: Passive_Cu_Liner_detector_bay
COMPONENTS.install: Thin Cu liner outside the OVC but inside the CsI veto, in the detector-bay region only. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Graded-Z inner layer and local passive mass for fluorescence/scattering studies.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 0.8 mm Cu, bay-limited so it does not wrap the full upper DR tower.

COMPONENTS.name: Passive_W_Liner_detector_bay
COMPONENTS.install: Thin W liner outside the Cu liner, bay-limited. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: High-Z passive shield proxy while avoiding W as the material closest to TES.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 0.7 mm W; side hole declared for the beam sleeve.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: DEMO2 graded-Z policy + balloon gamma shielding practice

COMPONENTS.name: Passive_W_Bottom_Plate_detector_bay
COMPONENTS.install: W bottom plate just below the OVC bottom and above the CsI bottom panel.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Hardens upward atmospheric/secondary photon path under the detector bay.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 0.2 cm W floor with 0.05 cm clearances to adjacent shells in the proxy layout.

COMPONENTS.name: W_Side_Aperture_Sleeve_collimator
COMPONENTS.install: 2 cm thick W sleeve through the side aperture of the CsI veto, aligned with the Laue focus beam. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Defines the local side-entry aperture and suppresses low-energy off-axis leakage through the veto penetration.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: Inner radius follows 1.95 cm shield hole; outer radius leaves 0.5 mm clearance inside the 2.60 cm CsI side hole; axial thickness reduced from 4 cm to 2 cm because the side-entry sleeve is a local leakage suppressor rather than a long high-aspect-ratio pixel collimator.

COMPONENTS.name: CsI_Side_Segment_00
COMPONENTS.install: One of eight CsI side-veto segments outside the cryostat; segment 04 carries the side beam aperture.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Active anticoincidence for local charged/Compton background around the detector bay only; not wrapped around the entire upper DR service tower.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 4 cm radial side thickness preserves original DEMO2 nominal side shield and keeps mass near the old 65 kg scale; 6/8 cm scan is mandatory.
COMPONENTS.source_tag: 511-CAM small shielded focal-plane concept + DEMO2 CsI policy

COMPONENTS.name: CsI_Side_Segment_01
COMPONENTS.install: One of eight CsI side-veto segments outside the cryostat; segment 04 carries the side beam aperture.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Active anticoincidence for local charged/Compton background around the detector bay only; not wrapped around the entire upper DR service tower.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 4 cm radial side thickness preserves original DEMO2 nominal side shield and keeps mass near the old 65 kg scale; 6/8 cm scan is mandatory.

COMPONENTS.name: CsI_Side_Segment_03

params.side_port_axis: -x_to_+x, centered at y=0,z=-5.2; shared by adjacent CsI segments 03/04

COMPONENTS.install: One of eight CsI side-veto segments outside the cryostat; segment 04 carries the side beam aperture. This segment shares the side beam aperture cut because the beam azimuth lies on the 03/04 segment boundary.

COMPONENTS.name: CsI_Bottom_Quadrant_00
COMPONENTS.install: One of four bottom CsI veto quadrants below the cryostat bay.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Bottom/upward atmospheric-secondary path is important for balloon background; bottom is thicker than the side.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 6 cm bottom thickness is an intermediate between original 8 cm bottom and v3p3 lighter bay model.

COMPONENTS.install: One of four bottom CsI veto quadrants below the cryostat bay.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Bottom/upward atmospheric-secondary path is important for balloon background; bottom is thicker than the side.

COMPONENTS.name: CsI_TopAnnulus_Segment_00

params.central_hole: passes upper cryostat/service tower; not an optical bore

COMPONENTS.install: One of eight CsI top-annulus segments around the upper cryostat tower.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Closes the detector-bay veto while allowing the DR tower/services to continue upward without piercing active CsI.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 3 cm axial thickness; the central hole is mechanical/service clearance, not an observation hole.

COMPONENTS.name: ActiveShield_Al_Backplane_detector_bay
COMPONENTS.install: Al support/readout backplane outside the CsI side panels. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Active shield is not bare scintillator; packaging/readout mass affects local background.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 1 mm Al shell outside side CsI panels; bay-limited.

COMPONENTS.name: ActiveShield_Flex_Kapton_detector_bay
COMPONENTS.install: Kapton flex/readout layer outside the CsI panels. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Keeps active-shield electronics/support mass in the local model.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 0.3 mm Kapton layer; corrects the old Al/Kapton material confusion.

COMPONENTS.name: Outer_Al_Mechanical_Shell_detector_bay
COMPONENTS.install: Outermost bay mechanical cover outside the CsI veto. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
COMPONENTS.why_for_sim: Mechanical shell/support proxy and local activation/scattering mass; not a pressure vessel.
COMPONENTS.size_basis: 3 mm Al bay cover with top annulus around the cryostat tower and side aperture for the beam.

REMOVED_COMPONENTS.name: REMOVED_TES_SampleBox_Cu
REMOVED_COMPONENTS.reason: Deleted because user simulation found Cu-64 as an important 511-keV background source. Function replaced by Nb can + Cu cold finger/rail.

REMOVED_COMPONENTS.name: REMOVED_SampleBox_Al_Window
REMOVED_COMPONENTS.reason: Belonged to the removed Cu sample box; side-entry window chain now lives on shield/OVC side ports.

REMOVED_COMPONENTS.name: REMOVED_full-height_CsI_wrapping_DR_tower
REMOVED_COMPONENTS.reason: Active veto wraps detector bay only; upper DR/service tower is not surrounded by CsI in nominal.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: Stage_spacing_12cm_lab_commercial
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Return to v3 12-cm plate spacing to bound the activation/scattering effect of a lab-commercial dry-DR envelope.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: Delete_CP_plate_miniDR_or_open_cycle_variant
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Four cold-stage flight/minDR/open-cycle DR variant if project DR does not need a separate CP plate.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: CsI_side_thickness_4_6_8cm
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Quantify 511-keV veto leakage; current side is 4 cm, bottom 6 cm.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: MXC_plate_Cu_vs_Au_plated_Al
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Large nearby Cu plate is the next Cu-64 risk after deleting the sample box.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: Cryoperm_1p2mm_vs_4p5mm
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Magnetic margin vs Ni/Co activation mass.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: Remote_PT405_cold_head_and_compressor
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Complete dry-DR platform option; not part of detector-head nominal due PT mass/power.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: Open_cycle_DR_Archeops_style_platform
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Balloon platform option with wet/open-cycle DR rather than dry-DR.

SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.name: CSG_side_ports_to_implement
SYSTEMATICS_NOT_NOMINAL.purpose: Explicit holes for side windows, W sleeve, CsI aperture, OVC Be port, and +x cold-finger slots in final Geant4.

REFERENCES.fact: Commercial DR stage inventory: 50K, 4K, still, cold plate, mixing chamber, vacuum enclosure/radiation shields, dilution unit, heat switch, pulse tube.
SD system provides the SD-scale MXC flange anchor and optical access options; v3p5 uses the flange scale, not full lab spacing.
PT cold head mass/power are platform-level and non-nominal for balloon detector-head mass model.
Pointed 511 keV mission using focusing gamma optics and stacked TES microcalorimeter arrays; supports side-entry detector-bay philosophy.
TES/SQUID detector assembly uses hybrid outer Cryoperm + inner Nb magnetic shielding and filters at multiple temperature stages.
Resolve uses a microcalorimeter in a Dewar and an X-ray-transparent Be/mesh gate-valve window along the optical path.
Resolve illustrates custom flight cryostat/cryocooler chain and micro-vibration concerns, not a lab DR copy.
Sounding-rocket microcalorimeter payload demonstrates custom compact sub-K flight packaging.
Balloon experiment cooled bolometers to 85 mK using a flight/open-cycle cryogenic architecture.
Balloon cryogenic telescope uses a custom LHe bucket dewar; flight cryogenic payloads need not copy lab-commercial DR geometry.
